# PTO-AS (PTO Assembly) Specification

This page is a built-site landing target for PTO-AS links that resolve under `/assembly/`.

For the full rendered PTO-AS reference used by the ISA manual, see the parallel page at [`/docs/assembly/PTO-AS/`](../docs/assembly/PTO-AS.md). The grammar source remains in the repository at `docs/assembly/PTO-AS.bnf`.
